item.title:
New: Lennybot now lives natively within my Substack.
Trained on all of my ~350 newsletter posts and...
item.description:
New: Lennybot now lives natively within my Substack.
Trained on all of my ~350 newsletter posts and ~300 podcast interviews.
Check it out, ask it a question: https://t.co/3DzeiuQpl6
You can also text or call him anytime: +1 (877) 537-9455 https://t.co/DT4mtt7gtH
--- @lennysan | ❤️ 3 | 🔁 0 | 💬 2 | 👁 139
item.author: @lennysan

item.title:
Thrilled to have backed @nicbstme and the @fintoolx team as an angel.
Fintool was a magical produc...
item.description:
Thrilled to have backed @nicbstme and the @fintoolx team as an angel.
Fintool was a magical product that was able to do a lot of the heavy reasoning tasks before the models even existed.
Microsoft is getting an absolutely phenomenal product team 🎊
--- @nikunj | ❤️ 3 | 🔁 0 | 💬 0 | 👁 437
item.author: @nikunj

item.title:
The Claude Code hackathon is back for Opus 4.7.
Join builders from around the world for a week with...
item.description:
The Claude Code hackathon is back for Opus 4.7.
Join builders from around the world for a week with the Claude Code team in the room, with a prize pool of $100K in API credits.
Apply by Sunday: https://t.co/5MCkMtP5ti https://t.co/xmVhEQGtaL
--- @claudeai | ❤️ 1119 | 🔁 86 | 💬 84 | 👁 58070

item.title:
🎙️ Want a full breakdown on why cost per token is a key metric for AI infrastructure TCO?
We’re ope...
item.description:
🎙️ Want a full breakdown on why cost per token is a key metric for AI infrastructure TCO?
We’re operating in a power-constrained world. Demand for intelligence is scaling faster than infrastructure can keep up—so metrics like cost per GPU hour or FLOPs per dollar don’t tell the full story.
When it comes to TCO, Cost per Token is the metric that captures end-to-end performance across GPUs, CPUs, networking, software, and ecosystem making it the key driver of real profitability and scalability in AI.
If you’re not measuring efficiency at the token level, you’re missing what actually drives cost.
Watch the deep-dive conversation with Dr. Gerro Prinsloo , Nader Khalil and Carter Abdallah, live on the NVIDIA YouTube channel.
--- @nvidia | ❤️ 14 | 🔁 6 | 💬 2 | 👁 3841
item.author: @nvidia
